steps.title: Focus on Ryan Cole's role
steps.content: The goal is to emphasize the role Ryan Cole played with TSO. The relevant notes identify him as an electric violinist who toured with TSO from 1999 to 2008.

steps.title: Choose the role-centered sentence
steps.content: A splits focus between Cole and Daniel Ortiz. B emphasizes the time period more than Cole's role. C turns Cole into one example among many kinds of musicians. The role-centered sentence identifies him as a touring electric violinist. The answer is D.
